news.title: Tesla Terafab AI Chip Project Launching in 7 Days
news.snippet: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said the company's Terafab project to make artificial intelligence chips will launch in seven days.

tech.title: How to Learn AI in 2026? The Complete Roadmap
tech.snippet: Unsure how to learn AI? Follow this roadmap for No-Code Power Users and Technical Builders. Future-proof your career with our step-by-step guide.
